title: Walid's wedding
content:
Lezzeno 2035 
The stars are reflecting their beauty on the lake creating a poetic view, while I'm talking to the new investor on the phone..she's drawing the village on a small board her eyes catch up with mine to take my opinion every now and then. 
A night walk back to the apartment she asked " did her really kill her cat ? " 

Oran - 2035 
Walid holding his phone looking at it for a quite a moment.." should I call her ?" He asks himself... Suddenly a text message appeared..it's Amina..

4am phone buzzing...
"Hey I'm coming to lezzeno  tomorrow I need to talk with you" I just replied " Okay " and went to sleep.


Lezzeno - 2035
I drove him from Milan's airport to our usual coffee table..
" Do you really love this girl ? " I asked handing him sugar for his espresso before he replies " do you remember that first time you met your wife..?" I replied " it can't be the same my story is a rollercoaster" he laughed " well it's the same here ".
The waiter came to serve us a fresh lemon cake.." she texted me yesterday and said she's having hard times to forget and that leo was 7years old she basically grow up taking care of him " I replied with a smile " I have an idea why don't you buy her a new cat "..I continued sarcastically " taking a cat from here to Oran is also an animal abuse so I do recommend you buy it from Oran" 
Walid's eyes got bright and he agreed with my idea. 

Oran -2035 
" Hey can you come down " Amina looked from the balcony and there was walid parking his car looking up to her...he waved and as he did her dad waved back at him from the street...

Walid face was just imaginable at that moment..." Hello uncle I'm here to deliver this to Amina's she ordered a cat from our agency of animal adoption center "...her dad replied in warm tone " that's so great..it wasn't so long a careless and inhumane son of a bitch  killed our beloved cat leo "..walid with shaking voice " ah that's so bad I'm really sorry " her dad shake his hand took the cat and walked home.. meanwhile walid drove from there not believing all this happened..

Phone buzzing again " are you out of your mind " said Amina's in angry voice...walid replied " I didn't know your dad could be home I wanted to surprise you..plus how are you babe I miss you  "..she's used to his craziness so she just accepted her faith...and replied " can we meet later we need to talk "...this sentence makes any person heart beat faster than ever since it's a door to all kind of bad scenarios.." we need to talk "..


Amina walked in the restaurant carrying her cherry red bag in an elegant way she sat in front of him, Oran pink sunset reflecting on her dark eyes as she looks at him with a smile that melts every part of his heart...the talk wasn't so bad after all... after discussing and agreeing and disagreeing on a lot of stuffs walid and amina finally decided to move forward towards engagement day.

Fast-forward : 
Lezzeno 2035
" Tesoro walid is calling you " said my wife as I'm walking out from the shower .. somehow he picks the best moments to call.." hey man...I'm going to Amina's house but there is an issue.." I asked " what is it this time ? " Walid replied while I'm wearing my suit " it's her dad....I met him when I wanted to suprise Amina's with a cat and I pretended to be a delivery guy...I don't know what to do man he will for sure recognize me ".

" It's easy man..pretend you own the adoption center" both walid and my wife said at the same time 
" are you out of your mind " ...I replied " look I know someone that does own an animal adoption center you can say you work with him "... luckily that plan worked yet her dad questions were so on point on how he knows Amina yet walid's answers were designed to make him the gentleman of the year...

- Oran 2035  the wedding day.
Driving to the la blanche villa..." What if I did kill your cat " 
I asked my wife sarcastically as she replies " I would've bought a gun "..that made me laugh as we parked right in front of the villa I saw Adem he stood there waiting for me..I left my wife talking to Sabrina as we were catching up we both saw Abdellah coming with a different"R" this time and we can't tell if this is the last one or there will be more of them until he finally settles for good..

The sunset was just cinematic inan astonishing way that made everyone feel the moment as if it's a cut from a romantic tale...I walked back to Abdellah and asked " did you doit ? " He started laughing and adem knew exactly what we did just by looking at us..
